title: Applying for a visa :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
Learn about choosing a visa to apply for and how to make your application. Find out about the evidence you might need to provide with your application, how to prevent delays and how to sponsor someone's visa application.
- Summary of the steps to apply for a visa An overview of the steps to choosing a New Zealand visa, preparing an application and visa processing. Use the online tool to compare visa options and requirements to help you decide which visa to apply for.

## Summary of the steps to apply for a visa
An overview of the steps to choosing a New Zealand visa, preparing an application and visa processing. Use the online tool to compare visa options and requirements to help you decide which visa to apply for.
- How to prevent delays with your application Being fully prepared and planning ahead will help make sure your application does not need to be sent back to you for more information. Read the detailed information for the visa you want to apply for.

## How to prevent delays with your application
Being fully prepared and planning ahead will help make sure your application does not need to be sent back to you for more information. Read the detailed information for the visa you want to apply for.
- Visas you must apply for only online or only on paper Find out which visas can only be applied for online and which ones must be made on paper.

## Visas you must apply for only online or only on paper
Find out which visas can only be applied for online and which ones must be made on paper.
- Fees, processing times and refunds Find out about the fees, decision times and whether a refund might be available.

## Fees, processing times and refunds
Find out about the fees, decision times and whether a refund might be available.
- Applying online You can apply for most visas online. You can upload supporting documents, photographs and also pay for your application online. Learn how to set up a RealMe account so you can apply online securely.
You can apply for most visas online. You can upload supporting documents, photographs and also pay for your application online. Learn how to set up a RealMe account so you can apply online securely.
- Getting immigration advice Immigration advice for your visa application must come from a licensed immigration adviser (LIA), or a person who is exempt from being licensed.

## Getting immigration advice
Immigration advice for your visa application must come from a licensed immigration adviser (LIA), or a person who is exempt from being licensed.
- Providing evidence and documents to support your visa application Find out about the evidence and documents you might need to send us to support your visa application.

## Providing evidence and documents to support your visa application
Find out about the evidence and documents you might need to send us to support your visa application.
- Sponsoring someone's visa Find out who can sponsor a visa applicant, the sponsorship process and what the responsibilities of a sponsor are.

## Sponsoring someone's visa
Find out who can sponsor a visa applicant, the sponsorship process and what the responsibilities of a sponsor are.
